wrong_finding.title: Stripe webhook handler processes replayed events without idempotency key

why_wrong: Two mistakes. (1) Category 'data-race' is wrong: there is no concurrent mutation by two actors here — there is at-least-once delivery from a single producer. The correct category is 'webhook-replay' (BP-019). (2) Severity SEV-3 ignores the financial downstream impact: Stripe redelivers on the order of percent of events, so > 10% of paying customers can observe the duplicate. Correct severity is SEV-1 per R-SEV1-03 with category webhook-replay.
